description: Resolve the issue where push notifications fail to deliver on Android 14 devices, affecting approximately 8% of users.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user on Android 14 WHEN a notification is sent THEN it should be delivered successfully without manual intervention.

description: Improve the notification delivery latency from the current 340ms to under 200ms to enhance user engagement.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a notification is sent WHEN it is delivered THEN the delivery latency should be less than 200ms.

description: Implement a three-tier priority system for notifications to visually distinguish between urgent, normal, and low priority alerts.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user receives notifications WHEN a notification is sent THEN it should display the correct priority level (urgent, normal, low).

story_title: Add User Preference Page for Notification Categories
description: Create a settings page that allows users to opt in/out of specific notification categories such as marketing, product updates, and social notifications.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the notification settings page WHEN they select notification categories THEN their preferences should be saved and respected.

description: Enhance the design of the notification center to address accessibility issues for users with screen readers and colorblindness.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user with accessibility needs WHEN they access the notification center THEN it should be navigable and usable with assistive technologies.

description: Set up monitoring and alerting for notification delivery performance metrics to ensure compliance with latency targets.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place WHEN notification delivery metrics are collected THEN alerts should trigger if latency exceeds 200ms.

description: Develop a machine learning model to batch low-priority notifications into a digest format based on user engagement patterns.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user has low-priority notifications WHEN the ML model processes them THEN they should be batched and sent in a digest format at optimal times.

story_title: Collect User Feedback on Notification Preferences
description: Implement a mechanism to collect user feedback on notification preferences and experiences to inform future improvements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user accesses the feedback form WHEN they submit their preferences THEN the feedback should be recorded and analyzed.

story_title: Conduct A/B Testing on Notification Formats
description: Implement A/B testing for different notification formats to determine which format yields the highest click-through rate and lowest unsubscribe rate.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN different notification formats are deployed WHEN users interact with notifications THEN the CTR and unsubscribe rate should be measured and analyzed.

description: Develop additional metrics to track user engagement with notifications beyond CTR and unsubscribe rates.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN new engagement metrics are defined WHEN they are implemented THEN they should accurately reflect user interaction with notifications.
